form.formComment: Drawn inside box. At the last start finished 6th over 400m at this track beaten 10 lengths (23.95) behind Aston Joplin in a Grade 5 on April 1. Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 4 length fourth (23.01) over 390m at Warrnambool. Top-three hope with the right run.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in her races, The latest effort was a 7 length seventh over 400m at this track. Will need to improve to feature.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.63) when fifth over 400m at this track in a Grade 5. Has two successes and five minors from 14 starts from box 8. Has ability and looks a key chance.
